/usr/bin/c++   -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/iMOOSGateway.dir/MOOSGateway.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iMOOSGateway.dir/MOOSGateway_Info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/iMOOSGateway.dir/main.cpp.o  -o ../../../bin/iMOOSGateway   -L/home/toyat/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/toyat/moos-ivp/lib:/home/toyat/Documents/MIT/Arcturus/moos-ivp-arcturus/lib /home/toyat/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSCore/lib/libMOOS.a -lapputil -lmbutil -lm -lpthread ../../../lib/libgateway_protobuf.a ../../../lib/libgateway_tcp.so. -pthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lprotobuf /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libb64.so
